name: @platform/dev-services
description: Local development services: Docker Compose definitions, seed scripts, and local environment bootstrap.

readme.summary: Local development services: Docker Compose definitions, seed scripts, and local environment bootstrap.
responsibilities: Define Docker Compose service definitions for all local dependencies (Postgres, Redis, Keycloak, etc.)
Provide seed scripts to populate development databases with representative data
Offer a single bootstrap command to start a fully operational local environment
Document required local environment variables and their development defaults
nonResponsibilities: Not used in staging or production deployments
Does not own production infrastructure definitions (owned by infra-aws)
Does not define CI pipeline configuration (owned by tooling-ci)
usage: Run `docker compose up` from this package to start all local services
Execute seed scripts after service startup for populated local data
operationalNotes: Local service ports are fixed to avoid conflicts with host services ? see docker-compose.yml
Keycloak realm export is committed here to enable reproducible local auth setup
